plan_analysis:
The pre-research only provides generic background and a brief note about a March 2, 2026 geopolitical shock.  A forecaster still needs:

• Resolution mechanism clarity – exactly where to pull the “HIGH” column that Metaculus will use and what that column looks like.  
• Historical base rate – how high the VIX has spiked in comparable 10-trading-day windows, especially in March, and how often it exceeds various thresholds (30, 40, 50 etc.).  
• Key drivers – main things that move the VIX in the next four weeks: FOMC meetings, CPI/Payrolls, big-cap earnings, and the evolving Iran/Israel conflict.  
• Current state & trajectory – where the VIX sits right now, how large the March 2 spike actually was, option-skew data, current VVIX, and whether vol sellers are already stepping in.  
• Contrarian angles – evidence that the present shock will fade quickly (e.g., studies of past war-driven spikes) or, conversely, reasons the VIX could break much higher (Fed surprise, oil shock, credit stress).

The eight searches below are designed to collectively cover those dimensions: secure the official CSV (resolution), build a historical distribution (base rate), identify event risk (drivers & current state), and surface news that could push volatility in either direction (contrarian check).

queries_planned.query: CBOE VIX historical data csv high column
queries_planned.intent: Locate/verify the official Cboe CSV that contains the daily HIGH values used for resolution.
Get a long-run time series of intraday highs for base-rate calculations.
Find academic/blog analyses tallying how often the VIX crosses key levels in short windows.

queries_planned.query: VIX spikes around FOMC announcement dates
queries_planned.intent: Identify how Fed meetings historically impact VIX levels (key driver).
Confirm if a Fed decision, press conference, or Minutes release falls inside Mar 16-27 window.

queries_planned.query: Iran Israel conflict impact on VIX 2026
queries_planned.intent: Track ongoing geopolitical escalation/de-escalation that could move volatility (current state & contrarian).

queries_planned.query: VIX surge March 2 2026 intraday high level
queries_planned.intent: Pinpoint the exact current VIX reading after the recent shock to gauge momentum heading into the forecast window.
